**File 1**: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/duplicate_check_cmd.py`
Rename the CLI flag `--plan` to `--pr` and variable `plan` to `pr` in the Click command: - The Click option: `"--plan"` → `"--pr"`, keep `"-p"` shorthand as-is - The `"plan"` dest parameter in the option stays or can be omitted — the parameter name `plan: str | None` → `pr: str | None` - All uses of `plan` variable name → `pr` within the function body (where `plan` refers to the `--plan` CLI argument, NOT to other plan-related variables like `plan_data`, `existing_plans`, etc.) - Update help text referencing `--plan` → `--pr` - Update examples in docstring: `erk pr duplicate-check --plan 200` → `erk pr duplicate-check --pr 200`
DO NOT rename: - `plan_data` variable (a different concept) - `existing_plans` variable - `exclude_pr_id` (already named correctly) - `PlanDuplicateChecker`, `PlanRelevanceChecker` class names - `plan_list_service` attribute - General references to "plan" in docstrings/comments that don't refer to the `--plan` CLI flag - The `plan` variable in the list comprehension `for p in plan_data.plans` (the `p` shorthand)
**File 2**: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_fetch_context.py`
Around line 153, there is a Click option `"--plan"` with dest `"pr_number_arg"`. Rename: - `"--plan"` → `"--pr"` (just the flag name string in the decorator) - The dest `"pr_number_arg"` stays as-is (it already uses pr naming) - The help text referencing `PR number` stays as-is (it's already correct)
Read both files first, then apply all edits using the Edit tool.

1→"""Fetch all context needed for objective-update-with-landed-pr in one call. 2→ 3→Bundles objective, plan, PR details, and parsed roadmap context 4→into a single JSON blob, eliminating multiple sequential LLM turns for data 5→fetching and step matching. 6→ 7→Usage: 8→ erk exec objective-fetch-context --pr 6517 --objective 6423 --branch plnd/... 9→ erk exec objective-fetch-context # auto-discovers all arguments 10→ 11→Output: 12→ JSON with {success, objective, plan, pr, roadmap} or {success, error} 13→ 14→Exit Codes: 15→ 0: Success - all data fetched 16→ 1: Error - missing data or invalid arguments 17→""" 18→ 19→import json 20→ 21→import click 22→ 23→from erk.cli.repo_resolution import get_remote_github 24→from erk_shared.context.helpers import ( 25→ require_context, 26→ require_cwd, 27→ require_git, 28→ require_github, 29→ require_plan_backend, 30→ require_repo_root,
... [247 lines omitted] ...
53→ ObjectiveFetchContextErrorDict, 63→def _error_json(error: str) -> str: 64→ result: ObjectiveFetchContextErrorDict = {"success": False, "error": error} 176→ click.echo(_error_json("Cannot determine owner/repo from current context")) 186→ click.echo(_error_json(f"PR #{pr_number_arg} not found")) 196→ click.echo(_error_json("Could not determine current branch (detached HEAD?)")) 202→ click.echo(_error_json(f"No PR found for branch '{branch_name}'")) 210→ click.echo(_error_json(msg)) 217→ click.echo(_error_json("Cannot auto-discover PR without --branch or --pr")) 221→ click.echo(_error_json(f"No PR found for branch '{branch_name}'")) 228→ click.echo(_error_json(f"Objective issue #{objective_number} not found")) 234→ click.echo(_error_json(f"PR #{pr_number} not found"))

28→@click.option( 29→ "--pr", 30→ "-p", 31→ type=str, 32→ help="Existing PR ID to check (fetches body and excludes self from comparison)", 33→) 34→@resolved_repo_option 35→@click.pass_obj 36→def duplicate_check_plan( 37→ ctx: ErkContext, 38→ file: Path | None, 39→ pr: str | None, 40→ *, 41→ repo_id: GitHubRepoId, 42→) -> None: 43→ """Check if a plan duplicates any existing open plans. 44→ 45→ Uses LLM inference to detect semantic duplicates — plans that aim to 46→ accomplish the same functional change, even if worded differently. 47→ 48→ Also checks whether the plan's work has already been implemented 49→ via recent commits merged to the trunk branch (local mode only). 50→ 51→ Supports three input modes: 52→ - Plan ID: --pr ID (fetches plan body, excludes self from comparison) 53→ - File: --file PATH (recommended for automation) 54→ - Stdin: pipe content via shell (for Unix composability) 55→ 56→ Exit codes: 57→ 0: No duplicates found and not already implemented
... [45 lines omitted] ...

150→ help="Branch name (auto-discovered if omitted)", 151→) 152→@click.option( 153→ "--pr", 154→ "pr_number_arg", 155→ type=int, 156→ default=None, 157→ help="PR number (direct lookup, skips branch-based discovery)", 158→) 159→@click.pass_context 160→def objective_fetch_context( 161→ ctx: click.Context, 162→ *, 163→ pr_number: int | None, 164→ objective_number: int | None, 165→ branch_name: str | None, 166→ pr_number_arg: int | None, 167→) -> None: 168→ """Fetch all context for objective update in a single call.""" 169→ erk_ctx = require_context(ctx)

session.assistant:
Excellent! All changes have been successfully applied. Here's a summary of what was updated:
## Summary of Changes
### File 1: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/duplicate_check_cmd.py`
**CLI Flag Renamed:** - Line 29: `"--plan"` → `"--pr"` (shorthand `-p` remains unchanged)
**Function Parameter:** - Line 39: `plan: str | None` → `pr: str | None`
**Docstring and Help Text Updates:** - Line 32: Help text remains focused on PR ID functionality - Lines 52, 61-64: Examples updated from `--plan 200` → `--pr 200`
**Variable References (all `plan` → `pr` for the CLI argument):** - Line 66-67: Error message updated from `--plan and --file` → `--pr and --file` - Line 73: Condition check `if plan is not None` → `if pr is not None` - Line 75: Argument passed to `parse_issue_identifier(plan)` → `parse_issue_identifier(pr)` - Line 96: Error message updated from `--plan, --file` → `--pr, --file`
**NOT renamed** (as requested): - `plan_data`, `existing_plans`, `exclude_pr_id` variables remain unchanged - Class names `PlanDuplicateChecker`, `PlanRelevanceChecker` remain unchanged - General "plan" references in docstrings/comments remain unchanged
### File 2: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_fetch_context.py`
**CLI Flag Renamed:** - Line 153: `"--plan"` → `"--pr"`
**Preserved:** - The destination parameter `"pr_number_arg"` remains as-is (already uses `pr` naming) - The help text remains unchanged (already correct)
All edits follow the exact specifications provided, renaming only the CLI flags and their direct variable uses while preserving all other plan-related identifiers and documentation references.
